headline: Caterpillar’s CONEXPO Tech Push Meets Pricy But Momentum Backed Shares
summary: Caterpillar (NYSE:CAT) used CONEXPO to introduce new compact equipment, including its first stand-on compact utility loader and its smallest excavator to date. The company also revealed a concept pickup truck featuring AI and drone technology, alongside demonstrations of autonomous and connected jobsite systems. These announcements expand Caterpillar’s presence in compact machinery and highlight its focus on AI, autonomy, and connected worksites for construction customers. Caterpillar is...
